programme.title: The Jesus Strand: A Search For Dna
programme.desc: (PG) A man of faith and a man of science are teaming up to search for Jesus' DNA. Using the latest advances in DNA technology.

programme.title: Presidents At War
programme.desc: (M) The bombing of Pearl Harbour plunges an unprepared USA into WW2. Follow 8 future American Presidents through their wartime experiences - and how those experiences shaped them.

programme.title: Presidents At War
programme.desc: (M) Follows the 8 future American Presidents who actively served during WW2, from 1943 through to the war's end. Learn of their experiences and how these shaped them as leaders.

programme.title: Hidden White House
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
